title: Cheesy Polish Pasta Bake
description: A comforting and creamy pasta bake that combines the flavors of Poland with the richness of cheese.

ingredients.name: polish sausage
ingredients.notes: optional, can be omitted for vegetarian version

instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, cook polish sausage over medium-high heat until browned, breaking into pieces as it cooks.
In a large mixing bowl, combine cooked pasta, cheesy sauce, and cooked sausage.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for a few minutes before serving.
